title: The Impossible Vault
description: Legend speaks of an ancient vault beneath Elder Moor, built by a paranoid merchant prince centuries ago. No thief has ever cracked it. The Guildmaster believes you can. The vault contains treasures beyond imagination - and a puzzle that has stumped generations.

objectives.description: Locate the hidden vault entrance in Elder Moor
Solve the ancient puzzle lock at the entrance
Solve the master vault puzzle (combination of logic, riddles, and mechanism)

puzzle_challenges.name: entry_riddle
puzzle_challenges.description: Answer three riddles correctly to unlock entrance

puzzle_challenges.name: master_vault_mechanism
puzzle_challenges.description: Align five rotating cylinders with symbols matching constellation patterns

time_pressure.description: Once vault opens, ancient mechanism begins countdown - 10 minutes to loot and escape
time_pressure.failure: Vault seals permanently with you inside, must find alternate escape

optional_objectives.description: Take all treasures (slower) vs. grab essentials and run (faster)
Find the merchant prince's journal detailing vault construction

notes: Legendary difficulty. Puzzle-focused quest. Time pressure mechanic. Vault in Elder Moor ancient ruins. Rewards Master Thieves Tools (best lockpicking/trap tools).
